text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head to the shopping district to pick<n>up a few
things on my day off.<n>Coincidentally...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time, Spe! Let's stock up on good<n>luck...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: For the Eat-Till-You-Drop Tour, right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Would you like to<n>accompany us?
We're on our way to<n>the Eat-Till-You-Drop Seven
Gods of<n>Fortune Fine Food Tour! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: With the Seven Gods' blessings, ourbellies will be full not just with food,but with good luck too! This eventwas tailor-made for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And there's more! I've prepared<n>some special
charms, just for today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They're anti-bloat charms! You can<n>have these
two I made as backup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Looks like I'll be going for<n>seconds on
luck as well!
choice_data_list: Seconds on the weight gain too...
Seconds on the weight gain too...
Go and eat until you drop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Looks like I'll be going for<n>seconds on
luck as well!
choice_data_list: Seconds on the weight gain too...
Seconds on the weight gain too...
Go and eat until you drop!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Say what?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Fukukitaru, do you happen to<n>have any
charms that'll stop us from<n>gaining weight?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, sorry... You see, I gave the one I<n>had to Mc—uh,
the daughter of a<n>certain respectable family the
other<n>day...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After discussing which charms they'll<n>need the
next time around, the pair<n>head home.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right! First up is Ebisu's Eb-citing<n>Shrimp
Tempura Bowl—ten bowls to<n>be exact!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And I'll have the Daikokuten's<n>Dai-licious
Daikon Hot Pot for ten!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was delicious! Thanks to the<n>power of the
charm, I polished off ten<n>servings lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Yeah, y-you sure did.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll have the Benzaiten's<n>Un-bean-lievable Red
Bean Soup next!<n>I've got a whole nother stomach
for<n>sweets, so twenty servings should<n>be a piece
of cake! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki is waiting for me...<n>Waiting to
ferry me to the other side...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Eat-Till-You-Drop Tour really lives<n>up to its
name... They keep going until<n>they're on the floor...
